channel.title: AI Blog Factory
channel.description: Recent content on AI Blog Factory

item.title: 10 AI Tools That Write Essays for You in 2026 (Free & Paid)
item.description: Discover the top AI tools that write essays for students and professionals. Compare free and paid options, features, pricing, and ethical tips.

item.title: 10 Best AI Coding Assistants for Students in 2026 (Free & Paid)
item.description: Discover the 10 best AI coding assistants for students in 2026. Compare free tools like GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Cody, and more — features, pricing, and which one to pick.

item.title: 15 Best Free Websites to Learn Coding in 2026 (Ranked & Reviewed)
item.description: Looking for free coding websites? Here are the 15 best platforms to learn programming in 2026 — ranked by quality, content, and beginner-friendliness.

item.title: AI Tools for Math: Solve Any Math Problem Instantly in 2026
item.description: Discover the best AI tools for math in 2026. From Photomath to Wolfram Alpha, solve algebra, calculus, and more instantly.

item.title: Best AI Tools for Academic Research & Paper Writing in 2026
item.description: Discover the top AI tools for academic research in 2026. Compare features, pricing, and find the best AI research tools for students and PhDs.

item.title: Best AI Tools for Group Projects & Collaboration in 2026
item.description: Discover the best AI tools for group projects in 2026. Boost teamwork, streamline collaboration, and ace every assignment with these top picks.

item.title: Best Free AI Image Generators for Students in 2026 (Ranked & Tested)
item.description: Discover the best free AI image generators for students in 2026. Ranked and tested tools for presentations, projects, and social media.

item.title: ChatGPT vs Claude vs Gemini: Which AI Assistant Is Actually Best in 2026?
item.description: ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini — which AI assistant should you actually use in 2026? We compared all three on 10 factors so you don't have to waste time figuring it out.

item.title: Data Science Career Guide 2026: Skills, Salaries & Jobs for Students
item.description: Thinking about a data science career? This 2026 guide covers everything — skills, salaries, career paths, courses, and a semester-by-semester action plan for students.

item.title: How to Automate Your Life with AI as a Student in 2026 (The Ultimate Guide)
item.description: Learn how to automate your life with AI as a student in 2026. 10 powerful automations, tool comparisons, and step-by-step setup guides inside.

item.title: How to Build a Data Science Portfolio as a Student (With 10 Project Ideas)
item.description: Want to land a data science internship? You need a portfolio. Here's how to build one as a student — with 10 project ideas, tools, and a step-by-step guide.

item.title: How to Build a Personal Website for Free in 2026 (Step-by-Step Guide)
item.description: Learn how to build a personal website for free in 2026. Step-by-step guide covering GitHub Pages, Hugo, and other free hosting options for students.

item.title: How to Make Money with AI as a Student in 2026 (10 Proven Ways)
item.description: Discover 10 proven ways to make money with AI as a student in 2026. From freelance writing to AI art, start earning with these practical AI side hustles.

item.title: How to Start a Side Hustle with No-Code AI Tools in 2026 (Step-by-Step)
item.description: Learn how to launch a profitable side hustle with no-code AI tools in 2026. No coding required — just smart tools and hustle. Full guide inside.

item.title: How to Use AI to Land Your Internship in 2026 (Complete Strategy Guide)
item.description: Learn how to use AI to land internship offers in 2026. Step-by-step strategy covering resumes, cover letters, interviews, LinkedIn, and a 30-day action plan.

item.title: How to Use ChatGPT for Homework & Assignments in 2026 (Without Getting Caught)
item.description: Learn how to use chatgpt for homework and assignments the smart way. Tips, prompts, and ethical guidelines for students in 2026.

item.title: What Is Vibe Coding? How to Build Apps Without Being a Developer in 2026
item.description: Vibe coding is the hottest trend in tech. Learn what it is, which tools to use, and how to build real apps and websites without writing code manually.

item.title: 15 Best Free AI Tools for College Students in 2026
item.description: Discover the 15 best free AI tools every college student needs in 2026. From writing and coding to research and productivity — all free or have generous free tiers.

item.title: 7 AI Tools That Actually Help You Study Smarter (Not Harder)
item.description: Stop studying harder. Start studying smarter. These 7 AI tools help college students learn faster, remember more, and waste less time — all for free.

item.title: How to Build Your First Python Automation Script (Step-by-Step Guide for Beginners)
item.description: Learn how to build your first Python automation script from scratch. No experience needed. We cover file organization, web scraping, email automation, and scheduling — with complete code examples.

item.title: The AI Student Playbook
item.description: The complete playbook for students who want to use AI tools to study smarter, code faster, and build their tech career — even if you're just getting started.

item.title: About
item.description: About AI Blog Factory — founded by Joy Roy, BSc Data Science student and vibe coder. Premium digital guides, eBooks, and practical tech resources for students and creators.
